name: pavira-signature
description: Premium E-Commerce Platform for Home Decor Products

scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $p5 = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000).OwningProcess; if ($p5) { Stop-Process -Id $p5 -Force }; $p3 = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000).OwningProcess; if ($p3) { Stop-Process -Id $p3 -Force }; exit 0"
scripts.dev: npm run clean && npx --yes concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
